title: skytable
summary:
Skytable is a fast, secure and reliable realtime NoSQL database with keyspaces, tables, data types, authn/authz, snapshots and more to build powerful apps 
 A modern NoSQL database, powered by BlueQL. Skytable is a NoSQL database implemented using modern design paradigms, that focuses on performance, flexibility, and scalability. Skytable is primarily in-memory, uses multithreaded asynchronous IO and a custom AOF-based storage engine with advanced delayed durability transactions for efficient di

title: diskv
summary:
A disk-backed key-value store. 
 Diskv disk-vee is a simple, persistent key-value store written in the Go language. It starts with an incredibly simple API for storing arbitrary data on a filesystem by key, and builds several layers of performance-enhancing abstraction on top. The end result is a conceptually simple, but highly performant, disk-backed storage system.
